response.justification: Szabo brings 20+ years of professional software development with 6+ years of direct full-stack expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB). His current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching a required skill. While Nest.js and specific testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) aren't explicitly mentioned, his deep engineering background, TDD advocacy, and infrastructure mastery (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) suggest rapid onboarding. Recent career stability and progression to Staff level demonstrate maturity.
strengths: 20+ years development experience with 6+ years full-stack in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB); currently Staff Engineer using these daily
Active AI-agent infrastructure expertise—currently building MCP frameworks and agentic workflows, exactly matching job requirements
Complete infrastructure and DevOps knowledge (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) enabling end-to-end feature ownership beyond application code
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack; assumes framework knowledge can transfer from Node.js/TypeScript depth
Jest/Vitest/Playwright testing frameworks not listed, though TDD philosophy and custom testing library authorship suggest competence
Early-to-mid career showed 1-2 year role rotations (2014-2021); recent stability improved (3.2 years at Optilyz, now Staff role)

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment and current seniority level
